passive.name: Icathian Surprise
passive.description: 4 seconds after dying, Kogmaw explodes, dealing true damage to surrounding enemies.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} Upon {{tip|death|dying}}, {{ci|Kog'Maw}} enters an {{tip|untargetable}} {{tip|zombie state}} for a few seconds, gradually gaining {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}}. He explodes at the end of the duration, dealing {{as|true damage}} to nearby enemies.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} Upon taking {{tip|death|fatal damage}}, '''Kog'Maw''' enters a {{tip|zombie state}} for 4 seconds, becoming {{tip|ghosted}} and gaining {{sti|ms|{{as|10% '''bonus''' movement speed}}}} that increases up to {{as|50%|MS}} over the duration. At the end of the duration, he explodes to deal {{sti|true damage|{{as|{{pp|140 to 650}} true damage}}}} to nearby enemies.
wiki_detail.description2: While under this state, '''Kog'Maw''' becomes {{tip|invulnerability|invulnerable}}, {{tip|untargetable}}, and {{tip|cc-immune|immune to crowd control}}, but is also rendered unable to declare [[basic attack]]s, cast [[champion ability|abilities]], use [[summoner spell]]s, and [[active ability items|activate items]].
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Icathian Surprise'' grants {{as|{{ap|50/16}}% '''bonus''' movement speed}} every {{rutngt|0.25}} over the duration, up to the maximum of {{as|50%|ms}}. However, as a result of the ticks being rounded up from {{fd|0.25}} seconds, the movement speed only reaches up to {{as|{{ap|(50/16)*13}}%|ms}}.
* ''Icathian Surprise's'' {{tip|untargetability}} does not {{tip|homing projectile destruction|destroy}} in-flight {{tip|projectiles}}.
* ''Icathian Surprise'' will still trigger if '''Kog'Maw''' is killed by the {{tip|Nexus Obelisk}}.
* If '''Kog'Maw''' has the missile from a basic attack in-flight at the same time that he's moving while he dies, as long as the missile hits the target after ''Icathian Surprise'' has started, '''Kog'Maw''' will be able to use a basic attack once during ''Icathian Surprise''.
* '''Kog'Maw's''' usable [[summoner spell]]s will be placed on a 5 second cooldown upon becoming a zombie.
* During ''Icathian Surprise'', '''Kog'Maw's''' {{stil|attack range}} is reduced{{ft|to 0|by 500}}, making him automatically path near enemies he is trying to target.
{{Zombie state info}}

Q.name: Caustic Spittle
Q.description: Kog'Maw launches a corrosive projectile which deals magic damage and corrodes the target's armor and magic resist for a short time. Kog'Maw also gains additional attack speed.
Q.tooltip:
Passive: Kog'Maw gains {{ attackspeed*100 }}% Attack Speed.

Active: Kog'Maw vomits a corrosive projectile that deals {{ totaldamage }} magic damage to the first enemy hit and shreds {{ shredamount }}% Armor and Magic Resist for {{ shredduration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Kog'Maw''' ejects a wad of spittle in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to the first enemy hit, reducing their {{sti|armor penetration|{{as|armor}}}} and {{sti|magic penetration|{{as|magic resistance}}}} for a few seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Kog'Maw''' ejects a wad of spittle in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to the first enemy hit and reduces their {{sti|armor penetration|{{as|armor}}}} and {{sti|magic penetration|{{as|magic resistance}}}} for 4 seconds.

W.name: Bio-Arcane Barrage
W.description: Kog'Maw's attacks gain range and deal a percent of the target's maximum health as magic damage.
W.tooltip: Kog'Maw gains {{ range }} Attack Range and his Attacks deal an additional {{ totalhealthdamage }} max Health magic damage for {{ duration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Kog'Maw}} empowers his basic attacks for a period, gaining {{sti|range|'''bonus''' attack range}} and dealing {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} based on the {{as|target's '''maximum''' health}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Kog'Maw''' empowers his [[basic attack]]s for the next 8 seconds to gain {{sti|range|'''bonus''' attack range}} and deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} {{tip|on-hit}}, capped at 100 against {{tip|minion|minions}} and {{tip|monster|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Bonus Attack Range|{{ap|130 to 210}}}}
{{st|Bonus Magic Damage|{{as|{{ap|3 to 6}}% {{as|(+ 1% per 100 AP)}} of target's '''maximum''' health}}}}
wiki_detail.notes: * The attacks do not deal the '''bonus''' damage against [[structures]].

E.name: Void Ooze
E.description: Kog'Maw launches a peculiar ooze which damages all enemies it passes through and leaves a trail which slows enemies who stand on it.
E.tooltip: Kog'Maw spits bile, dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage and leaving a trail of ooze for {{ trailduration }} seconds. Enemies in the ooze are Slowed by {{ slowamount }}%.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Kog'Maw}} spews a gob of ooze in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit. It leaves a field of ooze in its wake for a few seconds that {{tip|slow|slows}} enemies.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Kog'Maw''' spews a gob of ooze in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.description2: A field of ooze is created in its wake for 4 seconds, {{tip|slow|slowing}} enemies every {{fd|0.25}} seconds.
wiki_detail.notes:
{{Effect at cast time start}}
* {{pending for test}}: The missile leaves a blob of ooze on the ground every 125 units traveled.

R.name: Living Artillery
R.description: Kog'Maw fires an artillery shell at a great distance dealing magic damage (increased significantly on low health enemies) and revealing non-stealthed targets. Additionally, multiple Living Artilleries in a short period of time cause them to cost additional Mana.
R.tooltip:
Kog'Maw shoots acid at an area, dealing {{ basedamagecalc }} plus {{ tooltipmissinghealthdamageamp }}% per 1% missing Health magic damage and revealing enemies hit for 2 seconds. Enemies below 40% Health instead take {{ maxdamagecalc }} magic damage.

Subsequent shots within {{ manacostduration }} seconds cost an additional {{ basecost }} Mana (max: {{ manacostcap }} Mana).{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Kog'Maw}} spits a globule of acid into the air that drops to the target location, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit based on {{as|their '''missing''' health}}. The damage is further {{ccs|doubled|magic}} against enemies at {{as|low health}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: '''Kog'Maw''' then gains a stack of ''Living Artillery'', stacking up to a cap.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|Living Artillery:}} For each stack, ''Living Artillery'' gains increased {{sti|{{as|mana cost}}}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Kog'Maw''' spits a globule of acid into the air that drops to the target location after {{fd|0.6}} seconds, granting {{tip|sight}} of the area before dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit and {{tip|standard sight|revealing}} them for 2 seconds. ''Living Artillery's'' damage is increased by {{as|{{pp|type=target's '''missing''' health|key=%|0 to 50 for 11|key1=%|0 to 60|formula=0.833% per 1% of target's '''missing''' health. ''This is capped at 50% increase at 60% '''missing''' health.''}}|health}}, or instead by {{ccs|100%|magic}} if the target is below {{as|40% '''maximum''' health}}.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Minimum Magic Damage|{{ap|100 to 180}} {{as|(+ 75% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|(+ 35% AP)}}|Maximum Magic Damage|{{ap|100*2 to 180*2}} {{as|(+ {{ap|75*2}}% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|35*2}}% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: '''Kog'Maw''' then gains a [[stack]] of ''Living Artillery'' for 8 seconds, refreshing on subsequent casts and stacking up to 9 times.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Living Artillery:}} For each stack, ''Living Artillery's'' {{sti|{{as|mana cost}}}} is increased by {{as|40|mana}}.
